title: The Coach’s OS
intro:
APPENDIX · COACH’S OPERATING SYSTEM

The Coach’s OS

Turn the curriculum into measurable improvement — weekly, advisor by advisor, KPI by KPI.

sections.title: The Weekly Coaching Cadence
sections.html:
The Weekly Coaching Cadence

A great curriculum without a coaching cadence is just a binder. Run this rhythm every week, without exception, and the advisor team will compound. Skip it and the playbook becomes wallpaper.

DayCadenceOutputTime
MonTeam standup — review last week’s KPIs, name one focus metric for the week.Weekly focus posted on the board.20 min
TueBoss Rush drill — 15 min, random objections, scored counters.Leaderboard updated.15 min
WedRide-along day — one advisor, one full workflow audited live with the scorecard.Scored ride-along sheet.45 min
ThuCall audit — pull two recordings per advisor. Score against current focus metric.One coaching note per advisor.30 min
Fri1:1s — 15 min per advisor. Praise specific behavior. Set one improvement for next week.1:1 doc updated.15 min × team

sections.title: The Ride-Along Scorecard
sections.html:
The Ride-Along Scorecard

RIDE-ALONG SCORECARD — ONE PER ADVISOR PER WEEK

Score each 1–5 (5 = mastery)

sections.title: The Shop KPI Dashboard
sections.html:
The Shop KPI Dashboard

These are the only nine numbers an owner needs to track to know the system is working. Wall-mount them. Update weekly. Color-code Green / Yellow / Red against target. If any metric goes Red two weeks in a row, the coach’s focus for the next week is automatically that metric.

Inquiry → Appointment %
≥ 65%
Module 1 leak indicator
Tour Delivery %
100%
Module 2 discipline
DVI w/ Media %
≥ 95%
Module 4 quality gate
PRS Completeness
100%
Module 5/6 discipline
1st-Objection Close %
≥ 60%
Module 7 mastery
Authorization Rate
≥ 75%
Module 8 outcome
Missed-Sale Recovered %
≥ 25%
Short-Stop effectiveness
ARO
Shop benchmark
Per-advisor variance flag
5-Star Review %
≥ 80%
Trust outcome scoreboard

sections.title: Red-Flag Behaviors — Stop the Drift Early
sections.html:
Red-Flag Behaviors — Stop the Drift Early

Red FlagWhat It PredictsIntervention
Quoting prices on the phone.Crashed appointment rate within 30 days.Re-run Module 1 drills. Audit greeting calls.
Skipping the shop tour for first-timers.Price objections triple, trust craters.Module 2 ride-along. Score every tour line for 1 week.
DVI without media on Yellow/Red items.Authorization rate drops 15–25%.Module 4 audit. Tech-advisor walk-the-bay reset.
Skipping Risk in PRS.“Let me think about it” becomes the standard reply.Module 5/6 PRS drill. Score Risk on every finding.
Pausing after Investment.Sticker shock takes over the room.Module 6 muscle-memory drill. Investment + Coverage in one breath.
Arguing with objections.Customer leaves and never returns.Module 7 Boss Rush. Practice acknowledgment.
Same-call kitchen-sinking.Authorization rate halves.Module 5 anti-kitchen-sink intervention.

sections.title: The HAB Oath — Cultural Anchor
sections.html:
The HAB Oath — Cultural Anchor

THE OATHRecited weekly. Signed at certification.

“I will assure every customer they called the right place. I will earn the appointment instead of quoting blindly. I will run the bases in order. I will defeat the bosses with words, not arguments. I will L → A → S → T when things go wrong. I will treat every car as if it carries my own family.
And I will never forget — Do what’s Right, Do what’s Fair, and do Your Best.”

sections.title: What to Build Next — The Curriculum Roadmap
sections.html:
What to Build Next — The Curriculum Roadmap

This document is v1.1 of the Sales OS (Foundation + 8 process modules + L.A.S.T. Recovery + Coach’s OS). The following expansions remain queued, in priority order:

  1. ✓ Module 9 — L.A.S.T. Recovery (deep). Shipped in v1.1. Psychology, four-beat diagram, 24-hour Recovery Window, scripts, drills, mastery, KPIs, worksheet.
  2. Per-advisor mastery card. A pocket-sized leave-behind summarizing the 8 steps, the Trust Triangle, and the 8 Boss tells. Magnet for the back of the boom board.
  3. Shop poster set. Six wall posters: Trust Triangle, Baseball Diamond, Vehicle Health Dashboard, Momentum Funnel, 90-Second Window, the HAB Oath.
  4. Worked-example library. One presentation walkthrough (like the water pump example in Module 6) for each major repair category: brakes, suspension, electrical, transmission, cooling, tires, alignment, A/C.
  5. AI roleplay scenario library. Map every Boss + each base presentation + each L.A.S.T. hot counter to a configurable AI persona for the app, with rubric scoring.
  6. ✓ Owner’s 90-Day Implementation Plan. Shipped in v1.2 as Appendix B. Three 30-day phases (Stabilize, Master, Cement), per-week actions, per-role responsibilities, weekly KPI gates, failure-mode playbook, Day-90 graduation criteria.
  7. ✓ Coach’s Toolkit. Shipped in v1.2 as Appendix C. SBI feedback framework, the five-beat coaching conversation, calibration protocol, psychological safety rules, difficult-conversation script, train-the-trainer ladder, Coach’s Oath, coach self-review worksheet.
  8. Workshop facilitator deck (PPTX). For consulting / leave-behind use in client shops.
  9. Certification packet. Printable promotion cards, signed certificates, and the lapel-pin artifact for Champion-level advisors.
